---
name: Feature request / improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, scripts, or dashboard
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the situation where the current behavior falls short — ideally from a real run.

**Proposed change**
What should happen instead? (Rough ideas welcome; check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first
in case it's already planned — comment on the existing issue if so.)

**Which layer does it touch?**
- [ ] SKILL.md (the workflow instructions)
- [ ] scripts/ (preflight / prepare_data / train / evaluate / dashboard)
- [ ] references/ (model catalog, data formats, troubleshooting)
- [ ] README / docs

**Willing to work on it?**
Yes / No / With guidance
